steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: Yo. Two bells, three of you. Come at me like you mean it — or you all go back to the Academy.

steps.speaker: Sakura
steps.text: Two bells? So one of us gets left behind?!

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: Hn. Then I'll just take one for myself.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: Wait — if we split up he picks us off one by one! We do this together. Believe it!

steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: ...Heh. Took you long enough. In the shinobi world, those who break the rules are trash. But those who abandon their comrades are worse than trash.

steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: That's the real test, Commander. Move your squad as one. You pass — Team 7 is official.
TIP: In battle, the Commander menu lets you Analyze a foe, give a Tactical Order (STR/SPD up), or use Chakra Infusion to restore your squad's chakra.
